requirements.note: toMarkdown() renders `## Guardrail: <title>\n\n<body>` format. Empty guardrails produce empty string via .join() on empty array. meta info is excluded. Default path uses console.log(toMarkdown(filtered)).

parseGuardrailArgs extracts --format option. When format==='json', outputs JSON envelope via ok() with phase, count, guardrails array including id/title/body/meta. Non-json or missing --format falls through to Markdown.
Missing phase and invalid phase both output JSON error via fail()/output() before format is checked, maintaining existing error behavior regardless of --format value.

unplanned.change: Extracted parseGuardrailArgs() helper per code review recommendation (review item #2 APPROVED)
Code review results document added (spec artifact, not product code)

summary.notes: All three requirements (R1, R2, R3) are fully satisfied. The implementation changes are confined to src/flow/get/guardrail.js as scoped. The parseGuardrailArgs helper was added per an approved code review recommendation. All other new files are spec/flow artifacts, not unplanned product code changes.
